reference: I am twenty years of age, weighing ninety-five pounds. I have had kidney stones and a stent placed, and they were blasted out about three years ago. Then, about five months ago, I had nose surgery. Now, for the past three nights, I have been experiencing fever only at night and very bad sharp chest pains, as if I am being stabbed. It feels like the pain is going through to my back. My kidneys are also having sharp pains, and I am experiencing the same sharp sensations in my lower abdomen. What could this mean?
text: I am 20 years of age, weighing 95 pounds. I have had kidney stones and a stent placed, and they were blasted out about 10 years ago. Then, about 5 months ago, I had nose surgery. Now, for the past 3 nights, I have been experiencing fever only at night and very bad sharp chest pains, as if I am being stabbed. It feels like the pain is going through to my back. My kidneys are also having sharp pains, and I am experiencing the same sharp sensations in my lower abdomen. What could this mean?
